title: Trying to extract sender name an email address from outlook to my board
excerpt:
I have downloaded the Extract API and am trying to extract the sender’s name and email address (Outlook) 
Is this only possible with Gmail? 
If so, is there another way to achieve this?

posts.author: cschulz (Cory Schulz)
